product_title: Avanti WDB101, Color
clean_review_text: The assembly instructions leave out a couple of important things. First, there is no part “P”. There are two rods labeled P but these are actually the other two E parts that you screw together to form the legs. Now about those E parts: two of them have grooves in the middle and two don’t. The ones with the grooves in the middle go on the back legs. The grooves are what hold the plastic gizmos that hold the brace in place. This is not mentioned in the instructions. Once assembled, the thing does not seem very sturdy. The wire that forms the shelf for the dryer bows under the weight of the dryer which is about 50 lbs. I am going to get a board to put under the dryer to make it a bit more stable. So given the poor quality and the pain in the neck it was to assemble, I wouldn’t recommend this unit.

product_title: BLACK+DECKER Small Portable Washer, Washing Machine for Household Use, Portable Washer 1.7 Cu. Ft. with 6 Cycles, Transparent Lid & LED Display
clean_review_text: Great washer on the settings that work... If and when they do work. This is my third washer from Amazon. Needless to say not a single one works properly. By the time the third one came I couldn't even get customer service to listen to my problem. The washer doesn't work on multiple cycles. The most used cycle 'normal' will not even rinse the clothes, bulky won't spin the clothes and heavy refuses to rinse as well. It came with multiple dents all three times I've received the washer. This one the third washer only has four dents in it whereas the rest we're so bad I wouldn't even keep them if they worked. But they didnt. Also why is there a 2-hour delay if I use cold water on the normal cycle... That's just crazy. I even bought an extended warranty and for some reason I'm having trouble getting anybody to hear me out about my washing machine. If I spend over $300 on an item I expect it to work on all settings. Also this product would be way more maneuverable if I had multiple wheels on all four sides instead of just two in the back You almost have to tip the machine completely on its side to get it to roll. And the handles are so low on the machine I'm not sure exactly how they're supposed to be worked. Super disappointed in Black & Decker also for not backing up your products. So in conclusion if you would like a washer that works halfway this is the one for you! However if you would like your hard earned money to do what it's supposed to do look elsewhere! I will be updating my review if anyone reaches out to me or I get the problem solved!
llm_complaint_title: Multiple cycles don't work, dented washer
